summary: Bug fix verified: Products tab black screen issue in Lieferanten-Verwaltung is FIXED. The bug was caused by 1) SelectItem with empty value='', which Radix UI doesn't allow, changed to value='all' 2) Backend distinct() not properly awaited. Both issues resolved. All tested features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: SelectItem value='' changed to value='all' in SupplierManagement.jsx (lines 676-677 and 1077-1084)
Backend fix: list_products distinct() call is correctly using async/await pattern

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Lieferanten page loads, Products tab renders correctly with no black screen

seed_data_creation: Existing supplier 'Dell Deutschland GmbH' used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products tab black screen bug is FIXED. To access Lieferanten: 1) Go to /portal/admin 2) Login with admin@tsrid.com/admin123 3) Click 'Lieferanten' tab 4) Select a supplier 5) Click 'Produkte' tab. The page should show product search, table headers, and 'Keine Produkte' message if no products exist.

features_tested.Lieferanten-Auswahl: PASS - Clicking supplier selects it and shows details
features_tested.Produkte-Tab (BUG FIX): PASS - NO BLACK SCREEN - Shows product search, table, 'Keine Produkte' message
features_tested.Neues Produkt Button: PASS - Button visible and enabled when supplier selected
features_tested.Lieferanten API: PASS - GET /api/asset-mgmt/suppliers/all returns supplier data correctly

rca_of_issue.bug: Black screen when clicking Products tab in Lieferanten-Verwaltung
rca_of_issue.root_cause_1: SelectItem component with value='' (empty string) - Radix UI doesn't allow empty string values for Select components. This caused a React render error.
rca_of_issue.root_cause_2: Backend list_products endpoint had distinct() call that wasn't properly awaited (async issue)
rca_of_issue.fix_1: Changed SelectItem value='' to value='all' in SupplierManagement.jsx at lines 676-677 (category filter) and 1077-1084 (asset type filter)
rca_of_issue.fix_2: Backend distinct() call in list_products endpoint now properly awaited
rca_of_issue.verification: Products tab now renders correctly showing: product search input, category dropdown, table headers, 'Keine Produkte' message, and 'Neues Produkt' button
